hyperedges.description: RigUnit_ParentSwitchConstraintArray depends on multiple types including ControlRigExecuteContext, RigElementKey, and Transform for its constraint operations
Mathematical RigVM functions that operate on vectors, quaternions, and scalar values for angle and scaling operations
Movie rendering and sequencing components that work together for camera settings and scene rendering
Mass gameplay system components for entity management and visualization LOD parameters
AesWorld plugin components for earth modification, building editing, raster tools, lane directions, and gizmo coordinate systems
SlateAccessibleBehavior enum with all its possible values for accessibility behavior configuration
InputMappingRebuildType enum with all its values for controlling input mapping rebuild behavior
LaneDirection enum with values for lane direction indicators in traffic systems
RasterTool enum with values for different raster editing tools
EarthGizmoCoordAxisType enum with values for coordinate axis manipulation modes
MaterialLightingModel enum with values for different material shading models
Interchange scene nodes that manage transforms and integrate with movie sequences and material instances
Complete hierarchy showing AesWorld plugin with its modules and all classes defined in those modules
RigVM plugin with its module and math function classes
ControlRig plugin with its module and constraint array class
Multiple classes inheriting from the Actor base class
MovieSceneSequenceExtensions class with its key methods for sequence manipulation
MassGameplay plugin with its modules and mass-related classes
MovieRenderPipeline plugin with its core module and camera setting node
Engine and Takes plugin components for camera shake and recording functionality
